rationale: Educ. Code §22.011 governs prohibition on coercing school district employees regarding charitable contributions. It is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district board of trustees or school district employee may not directly or indirectly require or coerce any school district employee to:
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns employee charitable contributions, not property tax exemptions.
